name: Coconut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, milk, molasses, vinegar (if using), and salt in a heavy saucepan.
2. Stir over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Bring to a boil and cook, covered, for about 3 minutes until the steam has washed down any crystals that may have formed on the sides of the pan.
4. Uncover and cook slowly to the soft-ball stage (238°F) without stirring.
5. Remove from heat and stir in shredded coconut and butter.
6. Pour candy onto a buttered platter.
7. When cool enough to handle, shape into small balls and place them on foil to dry.
Yield: about 1 1/2 pounds of candy
